A

AbstractCell - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.models
Abstract base class representing a Cell on the 2D grid.
AbstractCell(int, int, double) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Constructs an AbstractCell at the specified coordinates with an initial pollution level.
AirCell - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells
Concrete implementation of AbstractCell representing an AIR cell.
AirCell(int, int) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells.AirCell
Constructs an AirCell at the specified coordinates with a default pollution level of 0.0.
AirCell(int, int, double) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells.AirCell
Constructs an AirCell at the specified coordinates with an initial pollution level.
applyZone(int, int, int, int, String) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.GridController
Applies a zone-selection brush filling a rectangle with a cell type.

B

BuildingCell - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells
Concrete implementation of AbstractCell representing a solid BUILDING cell.
BuildingCell(int, int, double) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells.BuildingCell
Constructs a BuildingCell at the specified coordinates.

C

CellController - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx
Controller mediating communication between AbstractCell model and JavaFX CellPresentation view.
CellController(AbstractCell) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.CellController
Constructs a CellController with the given cell model abstraction.
CellView - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx
JavaFX component rendering a Cell's state visually.
CellView(double) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.CellView
Constructs a CellView of the specified graphical size.
cleanup() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.SimulationView
Cleans up simulation resources, stopping the execution loop.
clearHistory() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Clears all recorded statistics history.
clearSimulation() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Resets the entire simulation to a clean state.
CLIController - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli
Controller mediating simulation data model updates specifically for the CommandLineInterface view.
CLIController(Simulation) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Constructs a CLIController with the given simulation abstraction.
CommandLineInterface - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.view.cli
Text-based interactive command-line interface view.
CommandLineInterface() - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.view.cli.CommandLineInterface
 
commitNextStates() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
Commits the pre-calculated next states for all cells in the grid.
commitState() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Commits the computed double-buffered state to the active state.
computeNextState(SimulationParameters, Grid) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Convenience method to compute the next state without a tick parameter, defaulting to 0.
computeNextState(SimulationParameters, Grid, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Calculates the next state of the cell based on neighbors and parameters, and stores it in the double-buffered next state field.
computeNextState(SimulationParameters, Grid, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells.AirCell
Calculates the next state of the air cell, applying wind-weighted advection-diffusion and subtracting neighboring vegetation absorption.
computeNextState(SimulationParameters, Grid, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells.BuildingCell
Keeps the next state pollution level locked at 0.0.
computeNextState(SimulationParameters, Grid, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells.FactoryCell
Computes the next state of the cell by locking its pollution level at its custom rate.
computeNextState(SimulationParameters, Grid, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells.VegetationCell
Computes the next state of the cell by absorbing pollution from its own cell.
computeNextStates(Simulation) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
Computes the next state for all cells in the grid, but does not commit them yet.
CyBreathe - Class in io.squid.cybreathe
CyBreathe launcher.
CyBreathe() - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.CyBreathe
 

D

draw(String, double, double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.CellView
Renders the cell visually according to its type name, pollution level, and customRate strength.

E

EAST - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Wind blowing East (1, 0).

F

FactoryCell - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells
Concrete implementation of AbstractCell representing a FACTORY cell.

Constructs a FactoryCell at the specified coordinates with an initial pollution level.

getAbsorptionRate() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the global absorption rate for pollution.

Gets the global absorption rate for pollution.
getAbsorptionRate() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.SimulationParameters
Gets the global absorption rate of vegetation cells.

Gets the simulation abstraction model.

Gets the historical list of average pollution levels.
getCell(int, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
Gets the cell at the specified coordinates.
getCellConsoleChar(int, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets a character representation of the cell type at (x, y) for console display.
getCellControl(int, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.GridController
Gets the CellController for the cell at coordinates (x, y).
getCellName(int, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the type name of the cell at (x, y).
getCellPollutionLevel(int, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the pollution level of the cell at (x, y).
getCellTypeCounts() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the counts of each cell type present in the grid.
getCellTypeCounts() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Gets the count of each cell type in the grid.
getCellTypeCounts() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
Calculates the count of cells for each type in the grid.
getCellTypePercentages() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the percentage distributions of each cell type present in the grid.
getCellTypePercentages() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Gets the percentage of each cell type in the grid.
getCellTypePercentages() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
Calculates the percentage distribution of cells for each type in the grid.
getCustomRate() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Gets the custom rate for this cell.
getDiffusionRate() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
getDiffusionRate() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Gets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
getDiffusionRate() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.SimulationParameters
Gets the global diffusion rate of pollution.
getDx() - Method in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Gets the horizontal offset step of the wind.
getDy() - Method in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Gets the vertical offset step of the wind.
getGrid() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation

getGridControl() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Gets the grid controller managed by this simulation.
getGridHeight() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the height of the simulation grid.
getGridHeight() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController

getGridWidth() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the width of the simulation grid.

Gets the height of the grid model.

Gets the height of the grid.

Gets the name of the cell type.
getNeighbors(int, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
Gets the Moore neighbors (8 orthogonal and diagonal directions) of the cell at (x, y), ignoring any neighbors that are out of bounds.
getNextPollutionLevel() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Gets the computed next pollution level (double-buffered state).

Gets the historical list of polluted air cell counts.
getPollutionLevel() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Gets the current pollution level of this cell.
getPresentation() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.CellController
Gets the cell view presentation.

getSpeedDelayMs() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Gets the delay between simulation steps in milliseconds for GUI execution.

Gets the delay between simulation steps in milliseconds for GUI execution.
getTickCount() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Gets the current tick count of the simulation.

Gets the current tick count of the simulation.
getWidth() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.GridController
Gets the width of the grid model.

Grid - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.models
Abstraction model for the 2D grid, managing cells and neighbors.
Grid(int, int) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
Constructs a Grid with the specified dimensions and fills it with default clean AirCell instances.
GridController - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx
Controller coordinating all grid CellControl elements for JavaFX GUI.
GridController(Grid) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.GridController
Constructs a GridController for the given grid abstraction model and initializes child CellController instances for all grid coordinates.
GridView - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx
JavaFX grid panel containing CellPresentations.
GridView() - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.GridView
 
GUIApplication - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx
Main graphical user interface application wrapper for JavaFX presentation window.

I

incrementTickCount() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Increments the simulation tick count by one.

Initializes the simulation model grid with clean AIR cells.

Initializes the GridView with its controller and the configuration suppliers.

L

loadFromFile(File) - Static method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Imports a saved simulation state from a binary file.

Loads a simulation state from a file.

Restores a simulation state from a binary file and rebuilds the controller links.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class io.squid.cybreathe.CyBreathe
Main entry point of the application.
massSpawn(String, double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Randomly spawns a percentage of cells of a target type across active clean air tiles.

N

NONE - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
No wind active (0, 0).
NORTH - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Wind blowing North (0, -1).
NORTH_EAST - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Wind blowing North-East (1, -1).
NORTH_WEST - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Wind blowing North-West (-1, -1).

R

rebuildCellControls() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.GridController
Restores/recreates cell controls after deserializing a new GridAbstraction state.
rebuildDisplay() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.GridView
Rebuilds the visual grid by clear-adding all individual CellView children and setting up their mouse and drag event handlers.
rebuildGridDisplay() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.SimulationView
Rebuilds the grid visual display.
recordCurrentStats() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Scans the grid, calculates aggregate statistics, and records them in history.
recordStats(double, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Appends the current average pollution level and polluted air cell count to the historical lists.
resetTickCount() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Resets the simulation tick count to zero.
resizeAndReset(int, int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Resets the simulation with a new grid size, preserving the existing simulation parameters.

S

saveSimulation(File) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Saves the current simulation state to a file.
saveSimulation(File) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Saves the current simulation abstraction to a binary file.
saveToFile(File) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Exports the active simulation state (abstraction and children data) to a binary file.
setAbsorptionRate(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Sets the global absorption rate for pollution.
setAbsorptionRate(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Sets the global absorption rate for pollution.
setAbsorptionRate(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.SimulationParameters
Sets the global absorption rate of vegetation cells, clamped between 0.0 and 1.0.
setCell(int, int, AbstractCell) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Grid
Sets the cell at the specified coordinates.
setCell(int, int, String, double, double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Replaces the cell at (x, y) with a new subclass representing the target type.
setCellType(int, int, String) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.GridController
Applies a cell brush modification at coordinates (x, y).
setCellType(AbstractCell) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.CellController
Programmatically changes the cell type by swapping the subclass instance in-place.
setCustomRate(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.CellController
Changes the custom rate directly.
setCustomRate(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Sets the custom rate for this cell, ensuring it is non-negative.
setDiffusionRate(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Sets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
setDiffusionRate(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Sets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
setDiffusionRate(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.SimulationParameters
Sets the global diffusion rate of pollution, clamped between 0.0 and 1.0.
setGrid(Grid) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Sets the grid model.
setHighlighted(boolean) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.CellView
Sets the highlighted border style for this cell view (e.g. during zone-brush selections).
setNextPollutionLevel(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Sets the computed next pollution level, clamping it between 0.0 and 3.0.
setParameters(SimulationParameters) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Sets the simulation parameters.
setPollution(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.CellController
Changes the pollution level directly.
setPollutionLevel(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.AbstractCell
Sets the current pollution level of this cell, clamping it between 0.0 and 3.0.
setPresentation(CellView) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.CellController
Sets the cell view presentation and updates it.
setPresentation(SimulationView) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Sets the simulation view presentation and updates it.
setShowDebugValues(boolean) - Static method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.CellView
Enables or disables debug values display globally.
setSpeedDelayMs(int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Sets the delay between simulation steps in milliseconds for GUI execution.
setSpeedDelayMs(int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Sets the delay between simulation steps in milliseconds for GUI execution, clamping it between 10 and 2000 ms.
setWindDirection(WindDirection) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Sets the wind direction of the simulation.
setWindDirection(WindDirection) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Sets the wind direction.
setWindDirection(WindDirection) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.SimulationParameters
Sets the wind direction.
setWindStrength(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Sets the wind strength of the simulation.
setWindStrength(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Sets the wind strength.
setWindStrength(double) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.SimulationParameters
Sets the wind strength, clamped between 0.0 and 1.0.
Simulation - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.models
Model layer representing the global state of the simulation.
Simulation(int, int) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Constructs a Simulation with the specified grid width and height.
SimulationController - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx
Controller mediating communication between SimulationAbstraction model and JavaFX SimulationPresentation view.
SimulationController(int, int) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Constructs a SimulationController with a new simulation of the specified grid dimensions.
SimulationParameters - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.models
Global configuration parameters for the 2D Cellular Pollution Simulation.
SimulationParameters() - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.models.SimulationParameters
Constructs SimulationParameters with default settings.
SimulationView - Class in io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx
JavaFX Dashboard presentation layer.
SimulationView(SimulationController) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.SimulationView
Constructs a SimulationView with the associated simulation controller.
SOUTH - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Wind blowing South (0, 1).
SOUTH_EAST - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Wind blowing South-East (1, 1).
SOUTH_WEST - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Wind blowing South-West (-1, 1).
start() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.cli.CommandLineInterface
Starts the interactive command-line interface loop.
start(Stage) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.GUIApplication
Entry point to launch the graphical user interface.
stop() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.GUIApplication
Performs cleanup tasks when the application is stopped, such as shutting down background threads.
syncUIWithModel() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.SimulationView
Synchronizes all sliders and wind controls with the current simulation model parameters.

T

tick() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Performs a single simulation step (double-buffered tick).
tick() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.models.Simulation
Advances the simulation by one tick, computing and committing the next states of all cells, and incrementing the tick count.
tick(int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
Runs simulation execution loop for a specific tick count.
tickMultiple(int) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Loops a specified number of ticks.

U

updateAllCellPresentations() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.GridController
Triggers updatePresentation on all individual CellControls.
updateCellPresentation() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.GridController
Updates the presentation (view) of all cells in the grid based on their current states.
updateDashboard(int, List<Double>, List<Integer>) - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.view.javafx.SimulationView
Updates statistical text and graphs on the UI panel.
updatePresentation() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.CellController
Redraws the Presentation layer using current Abstraction state values.
updatePresentation() - Method in class io.squid.cybreathe.controller.javafx.SimulationController
Triggers the Presentation dashboard to update charts and text panels.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

Concrete implementation of AbstractCell representing a Vegetation cell.
VegetationCell(int, int, double) - Constructor for class io.squid.cybreathe.models.cells.VegetationCell

W

WEST - Enum constant in enum class io.squid.cybreathe.models.WindDirection
Wind blowing West (-1, 0).
WindDirection - Enum Class in io.squid.cybreathe.models
Enumeration representing wind directions and their corresponding 2D grid offset vectors.
